title: CDN accelerated API returns intermittent 504 in Singapore and Jakarta
description: A BytePlus overseas customer reports that https://api.example-global.com/order/query intermittently returns 504 through CDN from Singapore and Jakarta users. Direct origin access is slower than usual but sometimes succeeds. The issue started around 2026-04-28 10:20 UTC+8. Nginx access log shows request_time=60.001 and upstream_response_time=60.000 for several requests. Business impact: checkout query API latency is affecting paid users.
